    A

    avaj - package avaj
     

    D

    dotProduct(double[], double[]) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Calculates the dot product of two vectors (arrays of doubles).

    F

    factorial(int) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Calculates factorial of integer n, where n >= 0

    M

    magnitude(double[]) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Calculates the magnitude (length) of a vector (array of doubles).
    Math2 - Class in avaj
    A class for math functions that are not in the standard Java Math class.
    Math2() - Constructor for class avaj.Math2
     

    N

    normalize(double[]) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Normalizes a vector (array of doubles) to have a length of 1.

    R

    randomInt(int, int) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Returns a random integer between min and max.
    round(double, int) - Static method in class avaj.Math2
    Rounds a double to a specified number of decimal places.
